case_title: WELLS FARGO BANK VS. PATRICIA HENDRIX

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HENDRIX, PATRICIA IND & DBA PRS & ASSOCIATES $30,951.18 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $30,951.18, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
APPLICATION FOR RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK AS TO DEFENDANT HENDRIX, PATRICIA IND & DBA PRS & ASSOCIATES
ORIGINAL NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK AS TO DEFENDANT HENDRIX, PATRICIA IND & DBA PRS & ASSOCIATES
PROOF OF SERVICE OF APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK SERVED JUN-26-2002, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT HENDRIX, PATRICIA IND & DBA PRS & ASSOCIATES
CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK AS TO DEFENDANT HENDRIX, PATRICIA IND & DBA PRS & ASSOCIATES SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED
ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY THE DEFAULT SECTION.
NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ISSUED.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,426.28 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $15,541.27 INTEREST, $856.50 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK
PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION, WRIT MAY BE ISSUED ON 7/31/02, IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT.
